_comment: CUSTOMIZE: Project V2 field and option IDs. These are project-specific and must be refreshed after running setup-github-project.sh.
_refresh: To refresh IDs: gh project field-list <PROJECT_NUMBER> --owner <OWNER> --format json | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print(f['id'], f['name']) for f in json.load(sys.stdin)['fields']]"
_setup: 1. Run bootstrap/setup-github-project.sh to create the project. 2. Use the _refresh command above to get your field IDs. 3. Use: gh project field-list <N> --owner <owner> --format json to get option IDs for each single-select field.
